creator: kasahara@nc.kyushu-u.ac.jp
text:
When installing net/freeradius3, pkg-static emits errors during 
"Registering installation":

-----------------
===>   Registering installation for freeradius3-3.0.2_2
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/local/share/examples/freeradius/raddb/mods-config/perl/example.pl): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/local/share/examples/freeradius/raddb/mods-config/attr_filter/access_challenge): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/local/share/examples/freeradius/raddb/mods-config/attr_filter/access_reject): No such file or directory

(omit)

pkg-static: lstat(/usr/local/share/examples/freeradius/raddb/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/local/share/examples/freeradius/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: duplicate directory listing: /usr/local/share/doc/freeradius/rfc/, ignoring
pkg-static: duplicate directory listing: /usr/local/share/doc/freeradius/, ignoring
Installing freeradius3-3.0.2_2... done
-----------------

It seems that files under example/freeradius aren't installed correctly, 
or pkg-plist is wrong.

Fix: 

I'm not sure how to fix this.
